## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members to GrowthX, introducing company tools, policies, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires introduced: Jesus (Argentina), Talal (US), Najam (Canada)](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Key tools: Slack, Geekbots, Linear, Notion, Loom, Zoom, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Onboarding resources in Notion and Linear; 4hr Pacific Time overlap required](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy; referral bonuses up to $10k USD for engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Alice: EA at GrowthX (Nairobi), supports operations/engineering, mother of 3](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Jesus: From Venezuela, living in Rosario, Argentina; enjoys reggaeton](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Talal: Pakistani in US for 5 years; enjoys tennis, reading sci-fi/fantasy](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Najam: Pakistani in Vancouver; ex-rock band guitarist, hiker, classic rock fan](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Company Tools Overview

  - [Slack: Team communication, integrated with Geekbots for daily stand-ups](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Linear: Project management, task tracking, technical issue reporting](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Notion: Knowledge management, client pages, SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Loom: Screen recording for process sharing](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Zoom: Video meetings](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Fathom: AI meeting note-taker](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Onboarding Resources

  - [Notion: Handbook \> Onboarding \> Company-wide onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Day 1: Tool setup](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Week 1: Manager meetings, onboarding buddy assignment, articles/videos](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Linear: Workspace \> Projects \> My Projects](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [Tasks organized by day/week, with Notion links and status tracking](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

### Company Policies and Expectations

  - [4+ hours overlap with Pacific Time required](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Mandatory daily Geekbot updates](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO (no approval needed, calendar blocking required)](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Employee referral bonuses: Up to $10k USD (engineering), $5k USD (non-engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings (next one tomorrow, introductions required)](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - Shared email (<team@growthxlabs.com>) for tool access and client call scheduling

### IT Support

  - [Slack channel "IT and tools" for tech issues](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Can tag Yusuf (head of cybersecurity/IT) or Alice for assistance](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete day 1 tasks in Notion/Linear](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - Set up shared email (<team@growthxlabs.com>) in Gmail
  - [Watch onboarding bootcamp recordings before Marcel's call](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Prepare introduction for tomorrow's all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Alice to fix missing calendar invites for Talal](https://fathom.video/share/M9gptdM85ifp5cizghH2kzPnSLewLC31?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
